title: podman commit: layer not known
body:
Along the lines of #18449 and #18659, but this time in `podman commit`:
```
not ok 256 |252| quadlet - image tag in 2448ms
.....
<+     > # # podman create -q quay.io/libpod/testimage:20241011 true
<+125ms> # d48daa531e65ed8666b5c631ab8e39abbbb7063a023278398c3ac23784e9c75e
         #
<+011ms> # # podman commit -q d48daa531e65ed8666b5c631ab8e39abbbb7063a023278398c3ac23784e9c75e localhost/i-t256-dvbdwicf:iO2UFgNPDk
<+347ms> # Error: copying layers and metadata for container "d48daa531e65ed8666b5c631ab8e39abbbb7063a023278398c3ac23784e9c75e": committing the finished image: creating image "0819f79dec8410ad3f6c7db3730da4eece14d589cd9707888fefc6c37fddc8b0": layer not known
<+007ms> # [ rc=125 (** EXPECTED 0 **) ]
```
Seen in [f40 root](https://api.cirrus-ci.com/v1/artifact/task/6012379727659008/html/sys-podman-fedora-40-root-host-boltdb.log.html#t--00256p)

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
